runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.10) at Taree Super Track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two wins and four placings from nine starts from the draw. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (18.10) at Taree Super Track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Has two wins and four placings from nine starts from the draw. Looks suited and should go close.

runners.formComment: Last start finished seventh over 324m at Richmond Straight, beaten 7 lengths (17.90) behind Black Kermaro in a Grade 5 on April 9. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh over 324m at Richmond Straight, beaten 7 lengths (17.90) behind Black Kermaro in a Grade 5 on April 9. Leading chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 150m mark hampered and came together.

runners.formComment: Strong performance to win by 5 lengths at Goulburn over 350m (19.96) beating Major Ted in Grade 5 on April 10. Looks to have an edge on most of these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 5 lengths at Goulburn over 350m (19.96) beating Major Ted in Grade 5 on April 10. Looks to have an edge on most of these.

runners.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Drink Rose at Gosford last start over 388m (22.95). Likely to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when third behind Drink Rose at Gosford last start over 388m (22.95). Likely to play a major role.

runners.formComment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a sixth over 400m at this track. Happy to risk in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a sixth over 400m at this track. Happy to risk in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Received significant interference in the early and middle stages of the race.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 400m at The Gardens, beaten 17 lengths. Likely to find this a bit tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 400m at The Gardens, beaten 17 lengths. Likely to find this a bit tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching the turn into the back straight and lost ground.
Came together entering the home straight and became unbalanced.
